summary: Executed pre-release full-system QA on public URL covering auth/session lifecycle, protected RPC auth guards, onboarding save flow, logs/revenue/report integrations, pause controls, export/delete privacy flows on temporary accounts, and baseline route accessibility in deterministic mode.

critical.issue: Mission payload can return negative inactivityLevel (observed -3), indicating future-dated logs are influencing inactivity math.

minor.issue: Allows future-dated entries; no guard prevents dates beyond current day, which can corrupt inactivity behavior.

ui_bugs.component: Auth logout redirect (AppShell logout + settings destructive delete signOut)
ui_bugs.issue: After logout/delete, browser is redirected to http://localhost:3000/... instead of staying on public domain.

integration_issues.issue: Could not reproduce banner in this run because reminder preconditions were not met in current server-day/account state (banner count 0).

action_items: Fix auth callback/redirect base URL configuration so logout/delete never redirect to localhost in preview/prod.
Add validation to block future dates in /rpc/logs (or clamp inactivity calculation to >=0) and harden inactivity metric logic in engine.
Re-run cadence banner scenario with deterministic date control or seeded Monday/Tuesday preconditions for guaranteed UI verification.
Investigate Recharts console warnings on weekly/monthly report render (container width/height -1) to avoid runtime noise.
critical_code_review_comments: frontend/.env.local sets NEXTAUTH_URL to http://localhost:3000/auth; this is causing cross-domain redirect behavior in auth flows on public preview domain.
In engine.ts daysInactive is not clamped and can become negative when log dates are in the future.
logs route validates min/max minutes but does not enforce date <= today, allowing temporal data corruption for inactivity-dependent UX.
seed_data_creation: Created temporary accounts via /register for destructive tests: qa.temp.*@zcvios.local and qa.delete.*@zcvios.local; created onboarding/log/revenue data during UI tests and deleted one temporary account end-to-end.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend regression tests passed on public URL after exporting env from frontend/.env. Core login/protected navigation/revenue/reports/settings/export/delete flows are working. Critical reproducible issue: logout (and delete signOut) redirects to localhost URL. Cadence reminder banner did not appear in this run due unmet day/state preconditions; requires deterministic date-control retest.
rca of the issue: RCA-1 (critical): Auth logout redirect uses localhost base because NEXTAUTH_URL is configured as http://localhost:3000/auth in frontend/.env.local; on preview domain this causes redirect to localhost path after signOut callbacks. Repro: login on https://lever-daily.preview.emergentagent.com -> click Sign out -> URL becomes http://localhost:3000/login. RCA-2: inactivityLevel negative because /rpc/logs allows future dates and engine computes raw day delta without lower-bound clamp. Repro: mission API returned inactivityLevel=-3 while isPaused=true, showing temporal inconsistency risk for inactivity/pause UX.
